Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sola]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Sola is known as Fallen Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Sola wears power armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 10''' — Sola uses the codename Fallen Sword.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 16''' — The narrator expects to meet Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 17''' — Sola is a combatant whose armor provides warnings and visual alerts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola has pale gray skin and an eye that shines with deathly green light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola has the marks of the Lichborn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola can split her Flame into several pieces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola uses a two-handed gun that runs with lightning.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola's gun can fire a lance of light that carries magic keyed to the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola's gun requires charging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola's weapons can dissolve into particles and enter her inventory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola possesses a unique spell that is beyond Archmage-level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola is bound to her armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola is bound to her greatest gun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 18''' — Sola uses a gun that can annihilate an entire hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 19''' — Sola has extraordinary compatibility with Aethertech weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 21''' — Sola has a leg that a little girl was prying off of.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 26''' — Sola spends her time dismantling the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 27''' — Sola might have seen a specific creation in a Hive before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — Sola is a character who uses a shotgun and has an inventory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — Sola is the Sword of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 29''' — Sola uses pulse boosters in her armor to dash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 32''' — Sola possesses a Worldslayer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 35''' — Sola is someone the Captain relies on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 38''' — Sola uses a gun that can be placed into an inventory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — Sola's eyes flare with green light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 39''' — Sola has bright green eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — Sola is ready to tear the ship in half if given a signal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 40''' — Sola has a camp focused on executing Omal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Sola wears bulky gray armor and can summon Worldslayer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Sola used a spear against the narrator's hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 44''' — Sola wears armor that can dissolve into floating blue cubes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Tendrils from the Iron King's back were battling Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Sola was about to revive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Sola was being reborn in flame in her room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 47''' — Sola wears a silver helmet with a visor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — Sola put away the Worldslayer.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 2''' — Sola is a crew member who uses suit speakers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 5''' — Sola is a crew member who seeks the destruction of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 9''' — Sola is a crew member who wears full armor and operates guns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 10''' — Sola is a crew member who previously operated alone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Sola piloted a captured Lichborn heavy shuttle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 12''' — Sola is a character who uses a pistol to shoot stun bolts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 15''' — Sola possesses weapons that can reach into Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 17''' — Sola stepped forward to protect the prisoners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Sola is in the personal weapons laboratory of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Sola's armor can be dispersed and re-formed by her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 21''' — Sola's suit visor streams text into her processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 24''' — Sola is a source for weapons in the envisioned fleet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Sola is a member of the crew of The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 29''' — Sola is a person who can control engines.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 30''' — Sola reads readouts from a monitor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Sola is a member of the crew who became more relaxed following the fall of the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 32''' — Sola is jogging.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 34''' — Sola wears a full suit of gray armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 36''' — Sola is responsible for readying the ships to fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 39''' — Sola is present during the discussion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 45''' — Sola sat stoically while Lichborn orphans crawled on her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 48''' — Sola has a Suncaster L-14 in her inventory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Sola projected a holographic schematic of Advocate headquarters from her suit's console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Sola has Union contacts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 50''' — Sola nodded to Shyrax's command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 52''' — Sola uses a powerful weapon and has a Temporal Field.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 4''' — Sola wears armor with a green visor and Aethertech.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 8''' — Sola wants to lock down the Zenith Cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 14''' — Sola reports problems to the narrator.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Sola is a reliable worker who works for hire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Sola is currently on another contract.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — Sola prefers sticking to the Iron Legion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Sola is a companion of Varic who operates the cruiser.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Sola is a companion of Varic who uses the Worldslayer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Sola communicates via a processor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 17''' — Sola used Worldslayer to shoot Sel’miroth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Sola reads and summarizes reports on the situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — Sola materialized in a dark, cramped room with pipes hissing over her head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Sola was on guard duty outside the bridge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Sola inspected the Zenith Cannon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 22''' — Sola handed the Zenith Cannon over to Omega.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 23''' — Sola toys with a gun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Sola is someone Varic intends to check on.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Sola is onboard the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 28''' — Sola was in the workshop sitting at a desk with a half-disassembled handgun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 32''' — Sola's medical room incorporates Lichborn design elements and a light made of flickering green flame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 35''' — Sola warned that going to the Heart of Visiria was a stupid risk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 36''' — Sola is tasked with targeting the Visiri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Sola is a crew member or entity on The Last Horizon who follows plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 37''' — Sola's ability to use weapons was limited by how much of the shield had to be maintained.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — Sola is a crew member of The Last Horizon who uses offensive firepower.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 39''' — Sola is a crew member.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Sola operates a console on The Last Horizon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Sola is a character who unloads missiles and Subspace torpedoes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 40''' — Shyrax woke Sola.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 41''' — Sola is part of a group that can draw up battle plans.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Sola is more prepared than the others and wears her armor at her console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 44''' — Sola told Raion to stay alive.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 3''' — Sola is a pilot of one of Horizon’s shuttles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Sola wears temperature-regulated combat armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Sola is the Vice Chief.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Sola uses a gun with impact rounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 4''' — Sola wears a green visor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 8''' — Sola has armor held in a frame.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Sola taps images on sensor displays and tosses them onto holo-projectors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Sola reacts to the star-map by identifying 'The Hive!'}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — Sola notes that everything needed to make a King is in the Hive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 12''' — Sola can fire weapons from the ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Sola is ready to fire and requested permission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Sola unleashes green fury on Omega’s daughter.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 14''' — Sola uses clones that engage Temporal Fields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 15''' — Sola won an exchange against Aila and splattered her across Dornoth’s orbit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 19''' — Sola manufactures ammunition and has a green Lichborn eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 20''' — Sola projects station maps from her armor's wrist console.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 25''' — Sola communicates via audio implant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 28''' — Sola is experiencing frustration and fear during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Sola is a crewmate of Omega who uses weaponry.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Sola uses a gun to control and target weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — Sola is a combatant currently fighting a clone of Aila.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Sola would return to the ship if killed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Sola lacks armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Sola uses a matter-reduction grenade from her Subspace inventory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 30''' — Sola's gun can dissolve into cubes of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 32''' — Sola wears full armor and is walking through the Titan Force headquarters.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 35''' — Sola believes there is always a trap.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Sola has family on Fathom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Sola is a gray titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Sola can activate a Temporal Field to dash.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Sola can conjure a handgun.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 37''' — Sola's helmet has speakers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 40''' — Sola's friend died.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 42''' — Sola is a passenger on the shuttle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 44''' — Sola is someone Aila Escalon has fought.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 47''' — Sola can summon her armor mid-stride.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — Sola can emerge from her Pyre safely on a ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Sola redirected power throughout The Last Horizon’s weapons systems.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — Sola advises the Captain to leave.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
